prompt_refine1: A woman with shoulder-length dark hair, wearing a white textured short-sleeve top with black trim and dark gray pants, stands in a well-lit boutique environment. She lifts the bag slightly upward and rotates it slowly to the left, allowing the camera to capture the side profile and the yellow trim along the edges. She shifts her stance slightly and continues to hold the bag at hip height, tilting it slightly forward to display the front design.
